
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
------------
| VERSIONS |
------------

Version 1.0
The aim of this version is to copy and/or verify raw data stored on a device.
The device can be a file  or a tape.

Version  1.1
A specific graphical interface  was created to creat Ganil_Tape
-If we do a copy from a tape to disk , the limited files is 2 GB, if a run is bigger, is divised in few files.
-with destination tape , you can go end of tape to fill it with others runs.
-it possible to create log file



Version 2.0
- a TCP device was added , client of Ganil Acquisition to get data buffers or/ and spectra. 
- conversion of Ganil spectra file in root histogram
- conversion of Ganil format run in TTree (with one sheet by parameter)
A dump can be done in raw data mode (default)  or in envents data.
- statistics on a run (file) can be done
- convertion of Ganil format run in TTree (in console mode)

Version 2.1
- a new Makefile to compile with or not with Graphical interface
- a begining of Spectra class has been developped  

Version 2.2
 - creation of a histogram class (database of spectra)
 - Incrementation of spectra in line 
 - user mode 
 - a Class "GAcq" has been created separate event handle with buffer handle  
    all class 
 
Version 2.3
  - creation of TTree for SCALER 
  - for Ganil_Tape
       - use library of GRU ( not a specific)
       -add a chek buton to see or not parameter = 0
       -add a buton to select directory  in Destination page

Version 2.31
  - debug in destroyer of GAcq and GSpectra ( NOT FINISHED)
  - creation of loadable library (see INSTALL)
Version 2.40
  - TMapFiles are not use any more
  - New Network Classes (GNetServerRoot and a GNetClient) 
  - a Visualisation in beta ViGRU


Version 06.02  ( the number of version change! now we give a date (06.01 for january 2006))
   - a Visu (ViGRU) is developped  ( see ViGRU paragraph) 


Version 06.04
    -the qt library is managed in a differnet way.
     $ROOTGUI is not use any more
     works only for root version 5.10 or above
  
Version 06.06
 -  multi-hits ( mutiplicity parameters)  is taken in account.

Version 06.09
we give up QT and use graphic library of root

Version 07.07
  - Warning a lot of changes ! 
  - Vigru is full root application
  - a User GUser class is available for user traitrement
  - Change of methode name: ( to avoid conficts with methods of TObject)
          GDevice::Info    ->     GDevice::Infos
          GDevice::Read    ->     GDevice::ReadBuffer
          GDevice::Write   ->     GDevice::WriteBuffer
          GDevice::GetName ->     GDevice::GetDeviceName
          GAcq::Info       ->     GAcq::Infos
          GVSpectrumIdentity::GetName ->     GVSpectrumIdentity::GetHistoName
          GSpectraInfo::GetName ->           GSpectraInfo::GetSpectraName
          GVListTree::Delete    ->           GVListTree::DeleteItem
          GVListTree::Checked   ->           GVListTree::CheckedItem
  - a spectrum data base is created in GSpectra, and as Server of this database (GNetServerRoot) cant be used to 
  - 2 specific class haved been added to do specific calibrations in ganil acquisition (GEtalonnage to treat calibration data and GSoapserver to communicate with 
      DAS). A new application "Calimero" is generated to treat calibration of must and matacq card.
  - GRU can be compiled without ganil network library (when we run "make GRU") 
    It is easier to compile outside of Ganil.  
   

Version 07.10
  - A new Ganil_Tape is available.
    QT library are completely removed. 
    Statistics ares given for each parameters
  - the version of non graphic Ganil_Tape have been given up, use GRU!
  - A bug give conversion and analyse of Ganil Data wrong So DONOT USE for this
     
 Version 07.11
  - A bug giving conversion and analyse of Ganil Data wrong   is corrected
  - new popup menu and setup allows vigru to have smaller dimension and can run on a labtop screen.

 Version 07.12
  - GCout is a "ROOT" class , have been completed and  gcout is not a global variable.
  - a bug in convertion of Ganil spectrum have been corrected

 Version 08.07
  - All management of histograms are done via the histogram database
  - Spectra server can be multiple on same machine if  no port different
  - Event generated with a Matacq card are taken in account
  - Save configuration in vigru have been review
  - Histograms can be add in a family.
  - A start of graphical interface  GGRU (in developpement)
  - The load of Ganil file is temporaly removed from vigru 
 
Version 08.07_1
  - remove bug of name null (".xml")  in saving configuration
  - can load without root config file
 
Version 09.03
  -New version of vigru, new look. 
  -Size of buffer can change
  -MetaServer in its fisrt version (concentrator of lists of histograms provided by several servers)
  -Can be compiled on MacOSX, 32 or 64 bits linux.
  
Version 09.10
  -Spectra server can use TH1,TGraph and TGraph2D 
  -Vigru can display TGraph and TGraph2D
  -a bug on tcp ganil connection removed 
  -Class GSpectrumIdentity include all management of TH1,  TGraph and TGraph2D  
    Outside of this class, only GSpectrumIdentity object should be used.
  -In vigru FFT of histogram can be done
  -a soap client have been defined
  
Version 09.11
  - vigru can save spectra in txt format
  - Calibration of mataq for piedestals and time
  
  
Version 09.12
  - vigru can set log x,y,z on page
  - vigru can detect peak on a pad or whole page (see Tools menu)


Version 10.05
  - 2 serious bugs have been removed from spectra server
    these bugs could hang server and client
  - Vigru : a reset of spectra of a full page is available
            a reset of all spectra of a server is available
  - a Client Narval have been done (connexion on a Watcher)
  - a standalone GRU  without cint is available ( GRUK for GRU kernel)
    this gru is drived by Soap client (GRUC) (do a "make" in gsoap directory
    thie GRUK and GRUC are only available in Ganil context 


Version 10.10
   - the scalers values can be dump in GanilTape 
   - a list of empty TCut can be defined in spectra server
    these TCut are defined with Vigru 
   - TMayaHisto are taken in account.
   - Leaks memory are reduced
   -TCut are fully completed , they can be defined end send to server, also they can be saved and reloded.
   -Save of spectra in root format takes in account family (directory) name.
   -Bug in read of XML file have been removed ( XmlDoc was free too early)
   -Display serveral spectra in same pad is possible 

Version 10.11
    - bug resolved : reset spectra form a server 
    - bug resolved : Cut form file could'nt be modified
    - bug resolved : apply log on pad with multi spectra 

Version 11.01
   - new menu to define process (copy, fft , scatter). this processes are applied from a over pad
   
Version 11.09
   - add button to select pad if middle mouse button is not available

Version 11.11
   - generated executables are now in /bin directory and library in /lib
   - 2 files (thisgru.csh and thisgru.ch) to define or complete $PATH and $LD_LIBRARYPATH
   
Note ROOT 5.30->5.32.00 do not allow a good operating (Spectra->Clone problem) so use 5.32.01 or above 

Version 12.03
   - Allow to generate random events from a ACTION file (GGeneBuffer * in = new GGeneBuffer("./ACTIONS_local.CHC_PAR");)
   - Tested for FC15
   - Out device  in GAcq (indevice,outdevice)  is available.

Version 12.06
   - Read and write compressed file in gzip format (run.dat.gz) 
     See GTape->SetCompressionLevel()
   - Improvement in GGeneBuffer : default gaussian random generator 


Version 13.03
   - Graphical version of GRU GGRU
   - a all in one GRU 
   - all soap function have been revisited and simplied  
   - a new GBase class on which all classes of GRU inherit
      this Class contains 
   - TClib and GNetCLientGanil removed
   - Calimero is same as GRUcore 
   - A State Machine controle the steps in case of use of GRUcore via a class GCommand 
     which define all available commands to drive GRUcore and include thie state machine
   - Read of MFM frames 2.2 in files 
   - GBuffer become virtual class  and GBufferIn2p3 and GBufferMFM inherits  form GBuffer
   - new virtual class GEventBase and GEvent and GEventMFM inherits form  GEventBase
   - Le connexion to the old Ganil acquisition is not supported . GNetClientGanil class have been removed
     TCPLIB directory have been removed.
   - The notion of "process" included in version 11.01 changes its name to "duplication" and "computation" (to be clearer).


Version 13.04 
    - remove a big bug in event analysis.
    
Version 13.04a
    - remove an other bug in reset histogram 
    
Version 13.07.00
	- new MFM library , in replacement of  irfu library
	- analyse offline and online of GET MFM events
	- new usage of vigru summurized with "vigru --help" command
	- Calimero have been completly replaced by GRUCore -> modification of Geco
	- GNetSpy class is removed due to no usage

Version 13.11.03
	- MFM library completed with exogam frame and first ebyedat frame
	
Version 14.01.21
    - MFM Library completed with merge frame and doxygen doc
    
Version 14.02.00
	- Ganil version with less bugs 
	
Version 14.04.00
    - MFM merge understood in GUser 
    - Modification of Main class in vigru 
    - unification of GRUlib 
    - MFM Oscilloscope understood in GUser
    - File ACTION_expname.CHC_STR not necessary in case of EBYEDAT (only ACTION_expname.CHC_PAR )
    - EventInit compatible with GECO
        Order to find ACTION file  gacq->EventInit("name")
        1) in local directory searching ACTION_local.CHC_PAR or ACTION_name.CHC_PAR file
        2) in GECO  directory searching ACTION_name.CHC_PAR file
        3) in DAS   directory searching ACTION_name.CHC_PAR file
        4) searching th "name" file ( for instance "name" = "/home/tartenpion/mydirectory/ACTION_myfile.CHC_PAR")
    - GClientMemory in writing
    - Vigru a new graphical interface to setup sources (spectra server)
    
Version 14.07.20
	- EventInit : fix bugs
	- MFM : fix minor bugs
	- MFM : add full cobo frame
	- color in info, warning and error print
	- New Class GFile . GTape and GMFMFile inherits form GFile.
	- ATTENTION! include/cards/GCobo.h  move to  MFMlib/Cobo.h
	
Version 14.07.20a
	- correction de bug dans MFM DataParameter->creatLabelToExist() ; The stat in GAcq was impossible.
	

Version 15.02.00
     - compilation with clang OK
     - tested with root 5.34.25 (not yet good for root 6 )
     - catch of Ctrl C to stop servers before exit
     - Ganil_Tape is lighter and accepts  direct run file ( you can launch " Ganil_Tape MyRun.dat")
     - tested on Ubuntu 14.04 but with gsoap 2.8.17-1 ! ( you need this gsoap version or >)
     - correction of a bug MFM in  CoboSetHitPat method
     - correction of a bug in list severs in vigru	 
     
 Version 15.03.xx
 	- New MFM frame for MUTANT
 	- New MFM frame for RIBF
 	- New MFM frame for xml data parameter 
 	- New MFM frame for Scaler

 Version 15.10.xx
     - Vigru include GAcq 
     - 1 new class for specific analysis : GAcqNumexo2 
     - Vigru Oscilloscope for Numexo2
     Note : this version is not compatible with gsoap  2.7.16 (version for Centos 6)   
     It is why a version of gsoap has been included in GRU directory.
     this 2.7.17 have to be compiled and used in gsoapSC library for its usage
     this soaplib need to be unziped and compiled and a link gsoaplib have to be created to this unziped directory
     to compile this you have to do  "./configure CXXFLAGS=-fPIC" and "make"
     So in directory gsoapSC, gsoapGECO and gsoap do a "make GSOAPLIBDIR=directory_of_new_gsoap"
     

  Version 16.03.09
    - Ready for  Centos7 gcc4.8 and gsoap 2.8.16-8(version for Centos 7)
    - Change in int vector in gsoap ( now transmission of int vector are un structure)
      DAS have to be ready for this change.( necessity for calibration of Must2)
    - soap interface to avoid redefinitions and better separation between GRU and soap code
    - New MFM frame Hello to check activity of flow
    - The MDI mode have been remove and aioGRU given up
    - New method in class GSpectra  ScanDirectoryMemory(TFolder* folder,char* path) {
      scan a TFolder get all spectra and references them  in Data Base (GSpectraDB)
      
   Version 16.09.03  
    - New Chimera Frame
    - Vigru in oscillo mode, few little bugs removed
    - 2 standard directories with GUser class for analysis,(standard Ganil and MFM)
    
   Version 17.04.25
    - Remove a bug reading spectra root file with vigru. Spectra with no family couldn't be displayed 
    - 2 New Frames Vamos Position Detector Frame and  Ionization Chamber Frame.
    - Compiled on Unbutu 16.04 and include tinyxml library for MFM library is tinyxml is not with system.
      done with root 5.34.36 and 6.08.06   
     - add a new format for Matacq card in ebyedat buffer
     -with 6.08 version dictionnary have problem (root people assure to correct
      this for version > 6.10  
      
    Version 17.09.00
     - New Frame Neda 
     - few modification around MFM statistics
     
    Version 17.10.04
     - 5 New Frames for S3 
     - few modifications around MFM statistics  
     - remove a bug in conversion of MFM frames to TTree file
     - remove minor bugs in display informations around MFM read files
      
    Version 17.11.10
      -  few modifications around MFM Neda frame   taking account frame in test more ( revision 0) and future more (revision 1)
      -  securisation of attibutes in Class ( Public -> private or protected)
      -  remove a bug in write of deta time in Merge Frame.
      -  remove bug in analyse of Diamant frame (GRU,  GEventMFM)
      -  New Frame Neda Compressed 
    
    Version 17.12.01
      - Modification in Neda Frames (frame size 560 -> 512)
    
    Version 18.02.02
      - Add revision  (0 and 1)  for Neda frames 
      - New options in MFMtest to treat only few frames
      
    Version 18.03.12
      - Correction of bugs in  simulated Diamant frames
      - more than one spectra servers can run in same process.
      - Ready for Centos 7 
      
   Version 18.06.10
      - work whith Root 6.12.06 but not fully ready
      - in MFMNedaFrame mask du bitfield et  ajout des fonctions bool MFMNedaFrame::IsNeutron, MFMNedaFrame::IsCFDValid, MFMNedaFrame::IsCFDParity
      - remove bug in MFMNedaCompFrame::GetNeutronFlag & MFMNedaCompFrame::SetNeutronFlag
      
   	  
   Version 18.09.03
      - Ganil_Tape is replaced by  a commande line application :  Blocktest.
   	  - Correction bug trasmission of list of spectra in soapserver 
   	  - The include directory is now empty. is filled after a "make" and a "make install"
   	  - Ready for Root 6.14.04
   	  
   Version 19.01.30
   	  - tested on Unbutu 18
   	  - Add Frame MFMVamosTACFrame
   	  - Add Frame MFMBoxDiagFrame
   	  - MFM can be compiled with no tinyxml if no usage. (make  NO_MFMNXML=YES) 
   	  - on gitlab.in2p3.fr ( GRU project) 
   
   Version 19.02.26
   	- Makefile better for git (creation of empty directories) 
   	- Makefile with "make install" 
   	- Add SumSpectra and few improvement in state machine
   	
    Version 19.04.05
       	- No wait in relaunch Spectra server or Soap server
    	- debug the  usage of SetRangeUser (Zoom) which can be applied on pad, tab or all tabs
    	- Add Time-Stop in  MFMBoxDiagFrame
 
    Version 19.06.30
    	- usage of Cmake in all libraries (exception  FDTlib) so some change in the names of directories and the place of sources files

   Version 19.07.25
   	- usage of CMake applied to Blocktest 
   
   Version 19.11.05
   	- MFMlib is detached of GRU projet so to compil modify CMakeLists.txt to find MFMlib or compile with this option CMake -DMFMDIR=directoryofMFMlib
   	- New Frames MFMReaScopeFrame and MFMReaGeneriqueFrame ( with MFMlib version >= 19.10.25)
   	- Version number is automatic and is date of compilation
      
    Version 20.XX.XX and more 
   	 See git informations
